case_title: MARVIN MOUTON VS. LEIVA JUAN ANGEL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED JUL-20-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANGEL, LEIVA JUAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-04-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-04-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-04-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MOUTON, MARVIN AS TO DEFENDANT ANGEL, LEIVA JUAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOUTON, MARVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANGEL, LEIVA JUAN $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $550.00, FOR THE USE OF THE PLAINTIFF'S WELDING MACHINE WITHOUT AUTHORIZATION. ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR REPAIR COSTS OF $5,000, THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT COMMIT TO COMPLETING ALL REPAIRS FOR $10,000, AND THE EVIDENCE SHOWS DEFENDANT COMPLETED REPAIRS IN THE APPROXIMATE VALUE THAT PLAINTIFF PAID. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
